title: Precision Echo
description: Use `echo` to print a string with a specific format, including escape characters.
problemStatement:
Using the `echo` command with the `-e` option (which enables interpretation of backslash escapes), print the following text exactly as shown, including the tab and newline:

`Cybron	Academy
Rocks!`

**Explanation:**
*   `\t` represents a horizontal **tab**.
*   `\n` represents a **new line**.

Remember, you need to pass the `-e` flag to `echo` to make these special characters work. Otherwise, it will print `\t` literally.
hints: Use double quotes around the text so the shell doesn't misinterpret the backslashes.
